div.head: The Chargé in Haiti (Gross) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Port au Prince, June 29, 1928—1 p.m.
[Received 2:45 p.m.]

div.p: 69. Department’s 33, June 28, 1 p.m.See footnote 64, p. 784. Haitian Government authorizes ship of the Pan American Airways to make contemplated flight. Permission also granted to use local Marine Corps’ landing field for this flight. The question of the Government granting permission for establishment of a regular service by this company will be considered but anticipate no difficulty in this regard. See my despatch No. 1050, August 8, 1927, High Commissioner’s Series.Not printed. Please request pilot to telegraph ahead day and hour of arrival here.
